user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Tailspin Toys.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 09:01 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
Date: 2024-02-15 17:11 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Tailspin Toys

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Steven Wilson <steven.wilson@tailspintoys.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-11 14:25 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-01-10
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on competitive positioning from our last session.

[00:05:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:19:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:23:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:28:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:33:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.
